type_definitions.name: TypeSignalsDocument
type_definitions.description: In-memory representation of the per-layer evaluation-result file (`<layer>-type-signals.json`, schema_version 1). Holds schema_version, generated_at timestamp, declaration_hash (SHA-256 hex of the declaration file bytes at evaluation time), and the per-type signals. Pure value type — no state transitions, no variant-dependent data. Introduced by ADR 2026-04-18-1400 §D1 to separate generated evaluation results from authored type declarations.

type_definitions.name: TypeSignalsLoadResult
type_definitions.description: Outcome of loading a signal document relative to the current declaration file hash. `Current(doc)` when the signal file exists and declaration_hash matches the current declaration bytes. `Stale { doc, expected_hash }` when the signal file exists but declaration_hash differs (fail-closed on both CI and merge gate per §D5). `Missing` when the signal file is absent (fail-closed per opt-in model of §D5). Variant-dependent data → enum-first.
